nasb.text: Even my close friend in whom I trusted, Who ate my bread, Has lifted up his heel against me.

esv.text: Even my close friend in whom I trusted, who ate my bread, has lifted his heel against me.

cnv.text: 連我信任的密友， 就是那吃我飯的， 也用腳踢我。

ccb.text: 连我所信赖、吃我饭的挚友也用脚踢我。

csbs.text: 连我信任的密友， 就是那吃过我饭的，也抬脚踢我。
